text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "---------- CONSULTATION regarding the request for: PSYCHIATRIC EXAMINATION of: 16/PHONE_NUMBER:08 ---------- Consulting physician: Dr. PERSONS_NAME on: 16/PHONE_NUMBER:56 Patient alert, lucid, oriented to time and place.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "Arrives in the Emergency Department due to 'strange sensation' after abundant use of alcohol.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "Reports being followed by Dr. PERSONS_NAME at the Mental Health Center of PLACE for bipolar disorder, currently on valproic acid, aripiprazole and diazepam at unspecified doses.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "Reports long-term alcohol addiction.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_4] ("2026-01-01", "Works, has a RELATIVE.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_5] ("2026-01-01", "Open and collaborative during the interview.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_6] ("2026-01-01", "No psychotic symptoms.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_7] ("2026-01-01", "Labile mood due to alcohol intoxication, with no pathological alterations in mood.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_8] ("2026-01-01", "No suicidal or homicidal ideation emerges.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_9] ("2026-01-01", "The patient reports that they already have an appointment with their mental health center provider.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_10] ("2026-01-01", "Mild anxiety.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_11] ("2026-01-01", "Lorazepam 60 drops is administered.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_12] ("2026-01-01", "No symptoms indicative of acute mental decompensation emerge at the moment.", 0.0, 1.0) | [S_13] ("2026-01-01", "From a psychiatric point of view, the patient can be discharged.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_14] ("2026-01-01", "Referred to their attending physician.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_15] ("2026-01-01", "--------------------", 0.0, 0.5)
